The contact owns a 2014 Land Rover LR2. The contact stated that while driving at an undisclosed speed, the air bag warning light was illuminated. The vehicle was not diagnosed nor repaired by an independent mechanic or dealer. The manufacturer was not made aware of the failure. T

My 2014 Land Rover LR2 HSE STARTED SMELLING STRONGLY OF FUEL IN LATE APRIL,2022. I contacted LAND ROVER NORTH AMERICA CUSTOMER RELATIONS ON 5/2/22 about the problem. Cris Willis opened Case# 8000998446 to assist me. He stated it was a recall issue awaiting parts to become active.

Transfer case failure due to seals leaking, resulting in oil leak and rendering the vehicle inoperable.  Repairs estimated at $2,261-$7,500 by authorized Range Rover service center in Grand Rapids, MI.

narrative.headline: What 2014 Land Rover Lr2 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 8 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Fuel System (38% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
